problem_solved: Respiratory diseases are often mis-diagnosed or not treated according to guidelines. LungHealth provides clinical decision support software that guides clinicians through consistent, algorithm-guided consultations for asthma and COPD diagnosis and management.
who_buys_it: NHS primary care practices, GP surgeries, respiratory clinics, secondary care hospitals
key_features: Algorithm-guided consultations based on NICE/GOLD/BTS/SIGN guidelines
Clinical decision support for accurate asthma and COPD diagnosis
Remote patient review capability for telemedicine consultations
business_model: SaaS - Software licensing to NHS trusts and healthcare providers
why_varden_should_care: High replicability - guideline-driven decision support is a proven pattern across specialties. The clinical workflow integration and NHS adoption model can be replicated for other chronic disease management.

problem_solved: Clinical trials for lung diseases (IPF, PPF, pulmonary hypertension, bronchiectasis) require complex imaging endpoints and data analysis. Qureight accelerates these trials through AI-powered imaging analysis and data curation.
who_buys_it: Biopharma companies, clinical trial sponsors, CROs, research hospitals
key_features: AI-powered lung image biomarkers (Lung8TM, Air8TM, Fibr8TM, Glass8TM, Vascul8TM) for clinical trials
Enterprise-grade imaging CRO platform for rapid patient inclusion and site onboarding
Real-world data products including synthetic control arms for lung diseases
business_model: SaaS / Service-based - Imaging CRO services and data products for clinical trials
why_varden_should_care: High replicability - AI imaging analysis for clinical trials is applicable across therapeutic areas. The platform approach combining software, AI, and data services creates a scalable model.

problem_solved: Accurate respiratory diagnostics and lung function testing is essential for diagnosing and managing respiratory conditions. Vitalograph provides spirometry and pulmonary function testing solutions for healthcare and clinical trials.
who_buys_it: GP practices, respiratory clinics, hospitals, occupational health providers, clinical trial sponsors, CROs
key_features: Comprehensive spirometry and pulmonary function testing (PFT) devices and software
comPAS PFT solutions for clinic and hospital diagnostics
Clinical trial services including respiratory endpoint solutions and home monitoring
business_model: Hybrid - Hardware device sales + Software licensing (SaaS) + Clinical trial services
why_varden_should_care: Moderate replicability - The software platform for respiratory diagnostics and clinical trial data management can be replicated. The hardware component reduces pure software replicability but the software layer is transferable.

problem_solved: 93% of asthma sufferers use their metered dose inhalers incorrectly, leading to preventable hospital admissions. MySpira uses augmented reality and gamification to teach children (ages 6-13) proper inhaler technique and asthma management.
who_buys_it: NHS GP surgeries, hospitals, schools, pharmacists, parents of children with asthma
key_features: Augmented reality (AR) modules for interactive inhaler technique training
8 gamified learning modules validated by University of Suffolk research
NHS Unlimited licensing for healthcare providers
business_model: SaaS / Licensing - App subscriptions and NHS institutional licensing
why_varden_should_care: High replicability - AR-based patient education is applicable across many chronic conditions. The gamification approach for pediatric health education is a proven pattern that can be extended to diabetes, allergies, and other conditions.

problem_solved: Sleep apnea and respiratory care requires ongoing patient monitoring, therapy compliance support, and device management. ResMed provides CPAP devices, masks, and digital health solutions for sleep apnea and chronic respiratory conditions.
who_buys_it: Sleep clinics, respiratory departments, hospitals, NHS trusts, patients (via prescription)
key_features: myAir digital health platform for patient monitoring and therapy compliance tracking
CPAP machines and mask systems for sleep apnea treatment
Remote patient monitoring and care management software
business_model: Hybrid - Hardware device sales + Software subscription (myAir platform) + Service contracts
why_varden_should_care: Moderate replicability - The digital health platform for remote patient monitoring and therapy compliance is highly replicable across chronic conditions. The hardware component reduces pure software replicability.

problem_solved: Respiratory disease diagnosis and monitoring requires objective, non-invasive measures of lung function. TidalSense develops technology for respiratory diagnostics and remote monitoring of patients with chronic lung conditions.
who_buys_it: NHS trusts, respiratory clinics, hospitals, clinical trial sponsors
key_features: Remote patient monitoring for chronic lung disease management
business_model: SaaS / Device-as-a-Service - Diagnostic technology licensing and remote monitoring subscriptions
why_varden_should_care: High replicability - Remote monitoring and diagnostics for chronic conditions is a broadly applicable pattern. The AI-powered biomarker analysis approach can be extended to other disease areas.
